variants.title: HiFi Filter FS 116 Breather Filter | Replaces the MP Filtri SA145G1L10A
variants.description: The genuine HiFi Filter FS 116 Breather Filter is HiFi's replacement to the MP FILTRI SA145G1L10A. Easy to install and replace, the FS 116 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
